sections.sectionTitle: Migilote' Daupaina: Amaute' leh Midikte' Mong Etkakna

verses.text: Israel mite bangin a lungsim a siangtho a thutang mite tungah Pasian hoih takpi hi
Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh ka khe kisuipuk dektak a, ka khe taal dektak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote' daupaina ka muh ciangin mi kihisakte ka eng hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nat velvalna bangmah thuaklo uh a, a pumpi uh cidamin zol hilhial hi
Amaute in midangte bangin haksatna thuaklo uh a, amaute in midangte bangin gimna ngahlo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khainiang bangin kiphatsakna ok uh a, puan bangin ngongtatna silh uh hi
A lungsim panun gitlohna pusuaksak uh a, a ngaihsutna uh gitlohna tawh a dimlet hi
Amaute in mi thusim loin el pau uh a, kiliatsakna tawh a sucip dingin mi a tawng uh hi
Amaute' gensiatna in vantung dong banto a, kiliatsakna tawh leitungah thu gen kawikawi uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite in amaute phat uh a, amau' mawhna zonglo uh hi
Amaute in, “Pasian in bangci theih ding ahi hiam? Sangpenpa in phawk ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi
Amaute migilo ahi uh hi. A tawntungin nuamtakin om hithiat uh a, amaute a hauhna uh khang semsem zaw lai hi
Ka lungsim siangsak a, mawhna ka bawlloh hangin a phattuamna om tuanlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh sunthapai-in gimna ka thuak a, zingsang simin hong kithuhilh hi
Tu-a bangin thu a gen hi leng, nangma mite tungah a thutaklo ka suak ding hi
Ahih hangin hih thu a bangci hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin kei-a' dingin a lunggimhuai mahmah nasep khat hong suak a
Pasian' biakinn sungah ka pai ciangin a thutawpna dongte ka tel hi
Nangmah in amaute mun nalna-ah na koih takpi ding a, a sia dingin amaute na tuksak ding hi
Tomno sungin amaute kisusia-in, lau mahmahna in amaute nilkhiamang ding hi
Amaute pen zana mangmat tawh kibang lel a, na khan'lawh ciangin amaute a bangci pian hiam, ci-in na phawk nawn kei hi
Ka lung khamin ka lungsim hong nat ciangin
keimah hai-in bangmah ka thei kei a, nangma mai-ah ganhing tawh ka kibang hi
Ahih hangin nangmah tawh ka omkhawm ngitnget a, ka khut taklamin kei na hong len hi
Thulahna tawh keimah nong makaih a, a nung ciangin minthan'na munah na hong tun'pih ding hi
Nang simloh vantungah kua nei ka hi hiam? Nang simloh ka deih ding leitungah kuamah omlo hi
Ka lungsim leh ka pumpi zawngkhal khading a, ahih hangin Pasian pen ka lungsim hatna leh keima-a' hi tawntung ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a kigamlate kisia ding uh a, nangma tungah a hong khialte na beisak ding hi
Ahih hangin kei-a' dingin Pasian' kiangah om ding a hoih ahi hi. Na sepnate khempeuh ka gentheihna dingin Topa Pasian ka hong bel hi.
